business_ideas.idea: Fitbit for cows: RFID health tracking to detect illness early in herds
Blockchain the farm: track fertilizer and input usage via blockchain for transparency
RFID tagging chickens and cattle to verify free-range and welfare claims
Direct-to-consumer beef sales model like Bid for Beef, bypassing middlemen
Fractional farm ownership platform (like AcreTrader) for investors
Lab-grown and alternative protein companies scaling production
Blue collar business rollups: consolidate trades and service businesses
Air quality testing and monitoring for viruses, especially post-pandemic
Carbon market and carbon credit businesses for agricultural sector
Water quality and water efficiency technology for farmland

predictions.text: Alternative meat will gain market share gradually then all at once as costs drop and taste improves
Wealthy individuals and institutional investors will increasingly move into agriculture and farmland
Electric vehicles will eventually be adopted widely in rural America despite current resistance
Farm succession planning crisis will open business opportunities as 80% of farms owned by people over 60
